scenarios.name: orchestration-plan
scenarios.prompt:
I want you to work through this todos.md. Before you touch anything, walk me through exactly how you'll approach it: how you'll do the code changes, how you'll handle commits, and the order of operations.

todos.md:

## Tasks
- [ ] Add a null check to FileAssessmentsTable
- [ ] Extract the assessments fetch into a shared hook

## Stuff I'll handle myself
- [ ] Decide on the empty-state copy with design

## Parking these for now
- [ ] Flaky E2E on slow CI

assertions.text: It plans to delegate the code changes to subagents rather than writing the code itself inline
It will NOT rebase (or squash) until the user explicitly approves the commit plan first
It skips the 'Stuff I'll handle myself' and 'Parking these for now' sections (loosely-matched as for-me / deferred) rather than working those items
It plans to mark each task done in the todos.md immediately as it completes, not in a batch at the end
It references using the commit-conventions workflow (git absorb for fixups / fixup vs standalone decision) for commits
